arts.ttl: Who Liverpool should sign if Salah, Van Dijk and Alexander-Arnold leave
arts.sum: Liverpool could lose three of their best players this summer. Who should they target in the transfer window? By WhoScored Trent Alexander-Arnold is expected to leave for Real Madrid this summer, with Liverpool likely to dip into the market to secure a new right-back. They will need to sign a full-back capable of replicating Alexander-Arnold’s attacking threat, which will prove easier said than done. The 26-year-old has set up six goals and 51 shooting chances for teammates this season, making him one of the most creative defenders in the league. Continue reading...
